Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 15
CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +15 SV COLD: +15
Focus: Spell Haste III
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Frostreaver's Embroidered Cloak
Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 15
CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +15 SV COLD: +15
Focus: Spell Haste III
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Cloak of Coldain Kings
Item Type:Armor

Rarity: Rare

Post Comment
confused
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2004 at 4:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758511483
2 posts
confused Heiro cloak or frostreaver which one you take and why?
▲ Page top
If You Can
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2003 at 12:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787209363
Scholar
243 posts
If you can get both the heiro cloak and this one or the other in the bank for specal event then your set. This Item is great for me when I solo as a 51 dru but I would rather take a heiro cloke on a raid...
▲ Page top
Great Cloak for Caster!!
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 12:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784482538
5 posts
Without the focus effect: Spell Haste III, I can say that this cloak worth nothing more than a Heiro Cloak or even an Ice Silk Cloak. Spell Haste III is the most important selling point on this cloak since it's the only NON No-drop item with this effect so far after PoP, also, the resist gives great bonus.

U don't know how important is the effect for a caster? Being an Enchanter, I can mez 0.5 second faster, cast Haste/slow/charm and other anonying buff faster, and also gate for nearly a second faster! I think when in higher level zone, 1 second means a lot more than the 75HP bonus, since most Mobs close to your level can hit u over 200+ within 1 second.

Edited, Wed Feb 5 00:21:17 2003
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 15 2002 at 7:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am looking for one of these on the Seventh hammer server. If you have one for sale please contact me in game (character's name: tinkiepixx) or leave a post here for me -- thanks =)
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 03 2002 at 9:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That and the fact that Dex has nothing to do with Channeling and Agi has nothing to do with Dodge.
RE: decent
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2002 at 4:11 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757232433
79 posts
Hiero Cloak still has 75 HP and 4 sta which adds another 5 HP, so 80HP you live longer. I agree, would rather wear Hiero in most situations, but remember that you dont need naki studded rings anymore with this cloak, so you can wear a better ring. Buffed my INT/CHA is maxxed out anyway. BTW, right now I wear Shimmering Terror Hide Cloak, for HP ;-)... well, yes, if I had the chance, I would really take this cloak and forget about Hiero...



Edited, Sun Sep 15 05:10:53 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 05 2002 at 12:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I looted this last night off of a level 45 dragon in Dreadlands during a GM event (Veeshan server).. Looks to be a nice item for my 45 druid for a long time to come.
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 11 2001 at 1:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Is it just me or is that gnome in the pic about as retarded as they come? I mean it's one thing to put your name, server, and guild in the item pic, but jeez he has to show off his stupid gnome ***. Come on, gimme a break, gnomes suck monkey balls.
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 02 2001 at 10:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am currently looking for one of these belts on the Zebuxoruk server - PAYING VERY WELL!!
RE: buying
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 7:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251361297
3 posts
It's not a belt ..... it's a cloak ....
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 13 2001 at 6:20 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is a REALLY nice cloak for a int caster!
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 4:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) the name says it all. also id like to add
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 22 2001 at 10:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think that this is quite possible the BEST Chanter Cloak in the game, as for the price. I'd say it's like Cloak of Flames. You really can't just say; well, it's 100K pp. It's just more or less priceless. But, It's of course also great for Healers and such, however, I'd go for a Lodizal Shell Shield myself. But, for an enchanter, this cloak r0xx0rz!
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 29 2002 at 9:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lemme tell ya, if no enchanter wants this I'll be happy to have it assigned.
Crudgel

# Apr 14 2001 at 2:23 PM Rating: Default

I'd take this over heiro anyday))
▲ Page top
Info
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2001 at 12:05 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ok, is killing the Dain coldain faction hit? Some of his citizens hate him. What level is the king?
▲ Page top
RE: Info
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2001 at 3:57 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes, killing Dain is a faction hit with Dain, the Coldain, and +King Tormax.
Dain is ll 70, hits for 425 most of the time, 300ish sometimes, and has roughly 250000 hp. No that isnt a type, 250 thousand HP. Using 60-65 people to fight him, it takes roughly 10 minutes to kill him.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 2:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hmm thats funny.. I watched Paradigm do him with 25 ppl.. those 60-65 ppl you was talking about.. any of them over 50 yet???
RE: Info
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2002 at 1:48 PM Rating: Default
angminas
View User Forum
155 posts
Did he say it was necessary to have 60-65 people? No. There are any number of reasons why they'd have that many...there could be a lot of hangers-on who are after faction or a good time. They might have been playing it safe because they'd never done him before. Et cetera. In short - don't be a jerk.

Teriuk Blackarrow
Warrior
Morell-Thule
